variants: Aaliyah Santos currently resides in Arborstone Quay, though she was born in Frostvine Bluff. She is an alumnus of the Duskvale Academy of Arts, where she focused on developing her consulting acumen. Aaliyah has been employed at Jupiter Crest Consulting, where her expertise has garnered recognition, including the Pinegate Laurel for her significant contributions. With each project, she strives to advance her career and make an impact in her field.
